testcase.name: InnermostFX smart contract > Initialization > initializes with correct order ID counter
InnermostFX smart contract > Initialization > initializes with correct trade ID counter
InnermostFX smart contract > Initialization > initializes with empty order commitments
InnermostFX smart contract > Initialization > initializes with empty nullifier set
InnermostFX smart contract > Token Minting > mints USD tokens successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Token Minting > mints EUR tokens successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Token Minting > mints JPY tokens successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Token Minting > rejects minting zero tokens
InnermostFX smart contract > Token Minting > tracks multiple user balances separately
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > creates a bid order successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > creates an ask order successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > locks correct amount for bid orders
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > locks correct amount for ask orders
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > rejects order with zero price
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > rejects order with zero amount
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > rejects invalid direction
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > rejects unsupported currency pair
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > creates batch of 2 orders successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Creation > creates batch of 4 orders successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Cancellation > cancels a bid order successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Cancellation > cancels an ask order successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Cancellation > rejects cancelling non-existent order
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Cancellation > rejects cancelling already consumed order
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Cancellation > rejects cancelling another user's order
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Matching > matches orders successfully - full fill
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Matching > rejects matching orders that don't cross
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Matching > rejects matching orders from different pairs
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Matching > rejects match amount of zero
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Matching > rejects match amount exceeding bid
InnermostFX smart contract > Order Matching > rejects match amount exceeding ask

InnermostFX smart contract > Partial Fills > handles partial fill on ask order
InnermostFX smart contract > Partial Fills > handles partial fill on both orders
InnermostFX smart contract > Price Improvement > refunds overbid amount to bidder
InnermostFX smart contract > Price Improvement > no overbid when prices are equal
InnermostFX smart contract > Currency Pairs > handles orders on USD/JPY pair
InnermostFX smart contract > Currency Pairs > handles orders on EUR/JPY pair
InnermostFX smart contract > Trade Recording > records trade successfully
InnermostFX smart contract > Trade Recording > increments trade ID after each trade

InnermostFX smart contract > Real-World Use Cases > trader fills 150k USD across multiple ask orders - blended rate
